_comment: 15th production-loop candidate (2026-07-07): GetCoordPairFromStruct (PD2 0x36710=222992), void __fastcall(CoordPair* pStruct, int* pnOutX, int* pnOutY). Three separate buf args: an 8-byte INPUT struct (nX,nY) and two independent 4-byte OUTPUT buffers -- exercises the oracle's general multi-buf handling (not yet a shadow-dispatcher class; needs a multi-outbuf generator class as future work).
name: GetCoordPairFromStruct
